name: execute_cypher
description: Execute a raw openCypher query against Neptune Analytics.

query.description: The openCypher query string to execute.

name: test_connection
description: Test the connection to Neptune Analytics.

name: find_similar_clients
description: Find similar clients using Neptune graph similarity algorithms. Algorithms: jaccard, overlap, common, total.

client_id.description: The client node ID to find similar clients for.

algorithm.description: Similarity algorithm: jaccard, overlap, common, or total. Defaults to jaccard.

min_score.description: Minimum similarity score threshold. Defaults to 0.0.

limit.description: Maximum number of similar clients to return. Defaults to 10.

name: compute_degree_centrality
description: Compute degree centrality for a list of node IDs.

node_ids.description: List of node IDs to compute degree centrality for (max 20).
